mapper.sql: id, name, image, id_card_no, phone, status, sex, birthday, address, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, remark, bed_number, bed_id, id_card_national_emblem_img, id_card_portrait_img
mapper.insert: insert into elder (id, name, image, id_card_no, sex, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, phone, remark, id_card_national_emblem_img, id_card_portrait_img, birthday, address) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idCardNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idCardNationalEmblemImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idCardPortraitImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into elder
id,
name,
image,
id_card_no,
sex,
birthday,
address,
status,
create_time,
update_time,
create_by,
update_by,
remark,
bed_number,
bed_id,
id_card_national_emblem_img,
id_card_portrait_img,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{idCardNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{birthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

#{idCardNationalEmblemImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{idCardPortraitImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update elder
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
id_card_no = #{idCardNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bed_number = #{bedNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bed_id = #{bedId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
id_card_national_emblem_img = #{idCardNationalEmblemImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
id_card_portrait_img = #{idCardPortraitImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update elder set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, id_card_national_emblem_img = #{idCardNationalEmblemImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, id_card_portrait_img = #{idCardPortraitImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
from elder where id_card_no = #{idCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and status != 0

select
from elder where status != 0 and 5 > status order by create_time desc

select
from elder where id_card_no = #{idCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and status != 0

select
from elder
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and id_card_no like concat('%', #{idCardNo}, '%')
and status = #{status}
and status != 5
order by create_time desc
